title: stu's epik mod!!!
description: an epik mod i made for my friends and i that adds the cheese dimension, the aether (i know there's a better aether mod shush) and a flesh dimension. also adds a shotgun and letter blocks and currency and some other stuff
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2322108670745d09932fdf87f1bcf885bab140f8.png)

my really really epik mod!

this was orginally made for my five friends and i, but i thought, why not post it to the public, where it can be judged by others.

this epik mod adds the aether (i know there's a better one shhhh shut up), the cheese dimension, the flesh dimension, and the ancient dimension. it adds a shotgun, and alphabet blocks and monies. it has a mouth mob, a cheese demon mob, and worms

idc what you do with my mod, just don't claim it as your own :D

VERSION 1.0 IS NOW OUT, NEEDS GECKOLIB [https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

made with mcreator :D
